title: Best Vanilla MP
body:
# ABOUT: Do you want to make vanilla more pleasant and convenient? This mod pack is for you! Adds beautiful animations, zoom, lightmatics, dynamic light, smooth interface, fast chat characters, support for various plugins that are installed on most servers, optimization, viewing of shalkers and a bunch of other things.

## LIST OF MODS:
Expand ### Features: - Particular - BVS - Best Vanilla Shader - 3D Skin Layers - Better Clouds - Lightweight Inventory Sorting - [Litematica](https://github.com/sakura-ryoko/litematica) - Shulker Box Tooltip - Not Enough Animations - Chunks fade in - Smooth Scrolling - Armortip - Zoomify - Bobby - Plasmo Voice - Clickthrough 2.0 - Continuity - RyoamicLights - AppleSkin ### Optimization: - Sodium - Lithium - Sodium Extra - Reese's Sodium Options - Enhanced Block Entities - ImmediatelyFast - Entity Culling - FerriteCore - ModernFix - fast-ip-ping ### Other: - Fabric API - Iris Shaders - Mod Menu - Cloth Config API - Motschen's Better Leaves - Translations for Sodium - Language Reload - Symbol Chat - Streamotes - Stendhal
## LINKS: - [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@lolip_p) - [Discord](https://discord.gg/Cz2sCWz5Wh) - [Telegram](https://t.me/LoLip_p_Community)
